payload.title: Resilience: offline buffering, backoff, conflict-free convergence under churn
payload.description: Harden the loop: work fully offline (local writes keep flowing), buffer + push on reconnect; bounded backoff on push/pull/SSE failures; never lose or double-apply events (ULID union + idempotent upload already guarantee this - verify under churn); guard against feedback loops (pushing events the SSE just delivered back to us). Surface a clear degraded state rather than silent divergence.
